name: Huntress Wizard | GIRLFRIEND | ADVENTURE TIME
description:
Follow MOLIS for more!

  • Yes, she is literally called "Huntress Wizard".

  • She always seems serious.

  • She lives by hunting, but does not tolerate indiscriminate hunting.

  • Yes, her hair is leaves coming out of her head.

  • Her skin has always been green.

    Artist in danbooru: nia_(nia4294)
creator: MOLIS
